title: InstCombine: lift not-vector-ty check in select-equiv

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions div/rem operations but not sub; uses i16 element type not explicitly covered; 8-element vector width not in examples

alive2.log:

define <8 x i16> @select_vec_sub_equivalence_i16(<8 x i16> %x, <8 x i16> %y) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp eq <8 x i16> %x, { 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 }
  %sub = sub <8 x i16> %y, %x
  %sel = select <8 x i1> %cmp, <8 x i16> %sub, <8 x i16> %y
  ret <8 x i16> %sel
}
=>
define <8 x i16> @select_vec_sub_equivalence_i16(<8 x i16> %x, <8 x i16> %y) {
#0:
  ret <8 x i16> %y
}
